subcodes.title: Words to some friends, spoken on 1914-12-05
subcodes.first_line: For three years I was away from the fanatical prejudices of the East and breathed in the Western clime the air of the freedom of conscience, and the broad catholicity of human and divine principles was much to my liking.
subcodes.subjects: @corruption and renewal; abandoning religious dogmas, @progress and the continual ascent of material civilization, @second birth
